name: 逆襲翻盤（廢后復位）
description: 從被廢入冷宮到重新被封為皇后，完成了從谷底到巔峰的完整逆襲弧線。觀眾看著女主一步步從無到有，積累的情感在這一刻完全釋放，獲得極大的滿足感。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Laura Lake is both virtuous and capable, possessing a noble disposition, and is concerned for the welfare of the people and the nation... She is hereby appointed as the empress of the central palace and granted residence at the skyworm keep.
